text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Curren, what kind of fan service do you<n>do during
winning concerts?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I don't really have a set routine.<n>Maybe I
should come up with one.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Then let's make one right now! I'll even<n>give you
some professional advice! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, really? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'll start off with what I<n>normally do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes on me and ooonly me!<n>Okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's all I've got... I bet it's a little<n>boring,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
N-no... it's perfect just the way it is!<n>Everything
from your tone to your pose<n>was flawless! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, thank you! I'm glad I got your seal<n>of
approval. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That was her normal routine? Curren...<n>Just who
are you?!
